description.ko: 고요한 보이드 속에서 진동하는 빛과 기하학적 조화를 통해 드러나는 보이지 않는 소리의 세계입니다.
description.en: The invisible world of sound made manifest through vibrating light and geometric harmony in a silent void.

prompt: An abstract 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, representing the 'Silence of a Supernova.' Rhythmic pulse waves of #4169E1 royal blue and #FF4500 orange morph into crystalline geometric structures that vibrate in a dark obsidian void. Intricate #FFD700 golden particles and #32CD32 lime green frequency peaks react to invisible audio oscillations. High-speed motion blur, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of a powerful sound wave frozen in time.
